rules.rule: No compat shims, [Obsolete] aliases, backwards-compat wrappers, or migration helpers. Aggressive API breaking with every call site updated in the same change.

Domain logic rides typed result/effect rails — C# monadic results, TypeScript Effect with tagged faults, Python typed results. Raw exceptions or dual error paradigms crossing domain boundaries are defects.
One function owns all modalities of a concern, discriminating on input shape. get/getMany/getById proliferation, function spam, and singleton helper files where an owning surface exists are defects.

NuGet versions live only in Directory.Packages.props, hand-edited. TypeScript dependencies are registry packages via pnpm with the committed lockfile; vendored SDKs are defects. Version movement is forward-only: a downgrade or stale floor without a recorded reason is a defect.

Code fences in planning design pages are the work product: transcription-complete signatures verified against the folder's .api/ catalogue. Abstract sketches, pseudo-code fences, hand-waved contracts, and wrapper or grab-bag abstractions inside fences are defects.

Workflow scripts are deterministic orchestration: schema-typed agent outputs, bounded loops, stage products written to disk with path receipts. Bare promises, unbounded polling, wall-clock branching, and subagents instructed to wait are defects.
